title: Drop the ‘toxic hot potato’: what Barton and McSweeney really revealed about the Mandelson scandal

title: Mission accomplished as king’s speech to Congress goes down a storm

title: Ukraine war briefing: More woe for Russian oil as Tuapse refinery hit again
description: Putin condemns drone attack; King Charles to US Congress – Ukrainians need your 9/11 spirit; acting US ambassador to leave Kyiv. What we know on day 1,526
content: A Ukrainian drone attack has caused another major fire at the Russian oil refinery in the city of Tuapse – the third attack on the Black Sea port in less than two weeks. Vladimir Putin, Russia’s president, condemned it as a “strike against civilian i... [3143 chars]

title: Billie Eilish puts Manchester at centre of new 3D concert film
description: Teaming up with filmmaking giant James Cameron, the superstar creates a unique love letter to her fans.
content:
Singing superstar Billie Eilish and filmmaking giant James Cameron have teamed up to make a new 3D concert movie, documenting her shows in Manchester last year.

title: Care scheme could prevent thousands of miscarriages a year
description: Current rules state that three unsuccessful pregnancies are needed to trigger NHS support - but a pilot project could bring about change.
content:
After going through two devastating miscarriages, Lisa Varey could not believe what she was thinking.
